description:
High up between the clouds, two dragons were playing a game of Go.
Suddenly, the Storm came and blew strongly.
Every single stone was moved from its original place.
In the dragons' fury they cursed the Storm and imprisoned him within a white stone. Now they must capture him before he gets out of their prison.

Thanks to: f18hornet, Mrmoto, and hello, for pointing out some mistakes.
